name: mostAsNtfFunctionEnableEx, mostAsNtfFunctionDisableEx, mostAsNtfFunctionIsEnabledEx
title: mostAsNtfFunctionEnableEx, mostAsNtfFunctionDisableEx, mostAsNtfFunctionIsEnabledEx
syntax: long mostAsNtfFunctionEnableEx(long fblockID, long instID, long functionID, char cbSendStatus[]);
long mostAsNtfFunctionDisableEx(long fblockID, long instID, long functionID);
long mostAsNtfFunctionIsEnabledEx(long fblockID, long instID, long functionID);
description: The behavior corresponds to the functions mostAsNtfFunctionEnable, mostAsNtfFunctionDisable, mostAsNtfFunctionIsEnabled. The functions ending with 'Ex' can also be used, if the CAPL node is not assigned to a function block exclusively.

parameters.name: functionID
parameters.description: Function ID or -1 for all functions of the function block from the database.

parameters.name: cbSendStatus[]
parameters.description: Name of the CAPL function that generates and sends the status message. If functionID=-1, cbSendStatus designates the prefix of the CAPL send functions to be defined. If an empty character string is specified, the default prefix "SendStatus_" is used.

availability: MOST25 MOST50 MOST150 While Application Socket is active
